h9257e6a3g267dg4074ga32fg3be6b6b30799: Well done, chief! Keep up the heroics, and the bards'll be singing about you.
hb91dbad5g8cb3g4e60gae4dg4df4dafc82b4: *The parasite flails in your head and Wyll's hand shoots to his temple.*
h6134654cge298g44adgb53eg263b9d1e891b: Still wriggling away. Here's hoping a cure's not too distant a prospect.
hcf364366g3830g4a24g8da4g8f9b9a1cceaa: We make a good team. Why not join me on the road?
h49ef82bbgab1dg442bga8fcg020c99c60ca9: A tempting notion. But the Blade must set his own course.
h8dd25f16gfaf2g4551ga2f0gafeba29dbd3d: A tempting notion. I can't say you weren't growing on me.
he323c5d4g1149g45d7g9e5fg6d505e215970: But it's time the Blade set his own course.
he4507109g0287g4a5bgbb26gdbe193ca6798: What is it they say? 'It is not the stars that hold our destiny, but our own shelves.'
h2d7310f9gd8b7g4a08gb4beg4ccd4a8b8523: I can't convince you to stay?
h0b4efefcg76f1g4603gb965g504fc65765c6: Careful, now - I might think you've missed me.
h6152e434g9493g476bg8155g24aa51604dda: But don't you worry. Winding paths often cross more than once.
hb7d107adg425dg4406g9d68g0772112f631c: Yes, how silly of me.  'It is not the stars that hold our destiny, but the elves.'
h080f070bgbf31g431eg8380g9162065a83fe: Good luck and godspeed then. And remember - winding paths often cross more than once.
hf9db5619g41e3g4942g82ccgb20ee4ebd810: They also say 'a mediocre man prefers his own company.'

he984a732gcc61g40f4gbde2g5f95f8bcf970: Yes, of course.  'It is not ourselves' stars that hold our destiny, but the elves.'
hf51e1641g1006g4e91g996fge7e6e7e04ecb: Are humans so quick to abandon their allies?
hdb9887f0g85ccg4673g8fd1g99580d501369: Need I remind you who first turned their back?
hcc6047cdg45e0g4da7gbe16gdd1e1b6d1b4f: My path leads to new allies and new frontiers. Good luck - and godspeed.
h299f9f41gd023g4da4g96eeg27946d06ab8d: A cure would be great - if we live long enough to find it.
h2859887bg795ag4129ga147gc272f65b4bad: Hardly the words of a legend! Hold your head high, and steel your face.
hc8a889ceg64f3g4c89g90cfgfe240503bd92: Death comes not for you - you come for it!

hf658a32bg0f4fg4a7fg8276gbb1c0913f902: But you'll be going that road without me. It's time the Blade set his own course.
hbf1f9a3cgb46eg42b8gb2fdgb37bd0643347: We'll find one, I'm sure of it.
h0b0e27ccg0a21g4585g9734g209df967ee84: I don't doubt you'll see victory, chief. Even the grave won't defeat you.
h624ec823g5eedg4fa1g94b1g190c2b120779: I don't know, I'm growing fond of the critter. I might keep it.

h194004bdg3a7ag429fg9736gc038c574876b: I will not rest until the invader has been purged from my body.
h0ae82075gc0efg44c9g96f2g4a2155d69567: You're fearless, Lae'zel. You'll have it yanked out in no time.
h24f294fdg2d83g4f4dgb49cgfd11d31f3a13: Stay fearless, my friend, and you'll have the bug yanked out in no time.
h98f3488fg02ceg40f3g9af9g5e373d59d4cf: I'll find a cure. And I'll do it alone.
h67b6a12bg1fbcg405ega15bgc781f2217607: It's the right call, I reckon. It's time the Blade set his own course.
h5ba54aafgcc58g48degbbcdg3007ba1d41c5: Well fought. In time, your own legend may surpass even my own!
hcf856cfbgcd51g4010g8ce2geab288f43efe: Didn't expect I'd see you again.
h0b8cc840gb635g44cbgbf7bgb1d0514eb564: Never been more thrilled to be wrong.
h3f42eadagd5d3g4ba3g850dgb14534af1216: Blow the horn - the trap has been set. Today, we write our own legends!
